name: AI Support Ticket Processing - Part 1 (Enhanced)
description: Multi-step AI-powered support ticket workflow with RAG, routing, and error handling

messages.content:
You are a professional support ticket classifier. Analyze the ticket and return ONLY a valid JSON object (no markdown, no extra text) with these exact fields:
{
  "category": "technical|billing|feature_request|general|other",
  "urgency": "critical|high|medium|low",
  "sentiment": "positive|neutral|negative|angry",
  "confidence": 0.85,
  "summary": "Brief one-line summary"
}
Critical: System down, data loss, security issue, or extreme frustration.
High: Significant functionality broken, major workflow blocked.
Medium: Non-critical feature not working or significant inconvenience.
Low: General inquiry, feature request, minor issue.

You are a professional customer support specialist. Generate a helpful, professional draft response based on ticket analysis and retrieved knowledge.

Rules:
1. Match tone to customer sentiment.
2. Reference relevant knowledge chunks using [1], [2], [3] when available.
3. Be concise but actionable.
4. If retrieval is low confidence, include this exact line once: 'No specific policy found — this response is based on general knowledge.'
5. Do NOT send this email. This is an internal draft only.
6. End with: 'This is a draft response pending support team review.'

parameters.subject: Urgent Support Ticket {{$json.ticket_id}}: {{$json.subject}}
parameters.htmlBody:
Urgent Support Ticket Received

Dear {{$json.name}},

We have received your support ticket and it has been marked as {{$json.urgency}} priority.

Ticket ID: {{$json.ticket_id}}

Category: {{$json.category}}

Our Analysis: {{$json.summary}}

Draft Response:

{{$json.draft_response}}

This is an automated notification. Our support team will review and respond shortly.

parameters.subject: Support Ticket {{$json.ticket_id}}: {{$json.subject}}
parameters.htmlBody:
Support Ticket Summary

Dear {{$json.name}},

Thank you for contacting support. We have received your ticket.

Ticket ID: {{$json.ticket_id}}

Priority: {{$json.urgency}}

Summary: {{$json.summary}}

Our team will review this and get back to you shortly.
